name: Social Media Campaign - Trending Topics, Poster Design & Auto Post

nodes.name: Campaign Schedule Trigger
nodes.notes: Triggers every Monday, Wednesday, Friday at 8:00 AM. Adjust the cron expression for your preferred posting schedule.

nodes.name: Manual Trigger
nodes.notes: Use this to manually trigger the campaign workflow on demand.

nodes.name: Fetch Google Trends
nodes.notes: Fetches daily trending topics from Google Trends API. Adjust geo parameter for different countries (US, GB, IN, etc.).

nodes.name: Parse Trending Topics
nodes.notes: Parses the Google Trends API response and extracts the top 5 trending topics with metadata.

nodes.name: AI Trend Analysis (Perplexity)
nodes.notes: Uses Perplexity AI to analyze trending topics and select the best one for a campaign. Requires Perplexity API key in HTTP Header Auth credential (Authorization: Bearer pplx-xxx).

nodes.name: Parse AI Analysis
nodes.notes: Extracts structured campaign data from the AI analysis response.

nodes.name: Generate Platform Content (OpenAI)
nodes.notes: Generates tailored content for each social media platform plus a DALL-E prompt for poster design. Uses HTTP Request to call OpenAI API directly. Create an HTTP Header Auth credential with Name: Authorization, Value: Bearer sk-your-openai-key.

nodes.name: Parse Generated Content
nodes.notes: Extracts platform-specific content and poster prompt from the AI response.

nodes.name: Design Poster (DALL-E 3)
nodes.notes: Generates a campaign poster using DALL-E 3 via direct HTTP Request to OpenAI Images API. Output is 1024x1024 HD quality. Uses same HTTP Header Auth credential as the content generation node (Authorization: Bearer sk-your-openai-key).

nodes.name: Prepare Poster & Content
nodes.notes: Combines poster URL with platform content for downstream posting nodes.

nodes.name: Download Poster Image
nodes.notes: Downloads the generated poster image as binary data for uploading to social platforms.

nodes.name: Upload to ImgBB (Image Host)
nodes.notes: Uploads the poster to ImgBB for a persistent URL. Required for platforms that need a public image URL. Set IMGBB_API_KEY environment variable.

nodes.name: Prepare for Multi-Platform Posting
nodes.notes: Combines hosted image URL with all platform content for parallel posting.

nodes.name: Post to LinkedIn
nodes.notes: Posts to LinkedIn with the campaign poster and professional content. Requires LinkedIn OAuth2 credentials with w_member_social scope.

nodes.name: Create Instagram Media Container
nodes.notes: Step 1 of Instagram posting: Creates a media container via the Instagram Graph API. Requires a Facebook/Instagram Business account and access token.

nodes.name: Publish to Instagram
nodes.notes: Step 2 of Instagram posting: Publishes the media container to Instagram.

nodes.name: Post to Facebook Page
nodes.notes: Posts the campaign poster and content to a Facebook Page. Requires Facebook Page access token with pages_manage_posts permission.

nodes.name: Post to Pinterest
nodes.notes: Creates a Pin on Pinterest with the campaign poster. Requires Pinterest API access token and board ID. Set PINTEREST_BOARD_ID env variable.

nodes.name: Campaign Summary
nodes.notes: Aggregates results from all platform postings into a campaign summary.

nodes.name: Set Google Sheet ID
nodes.notes: Sets the Google Sheets spreadsheet ID for campaign logging. Set CAMPAIGN_LOG_SPREADSHEET_ID env variable.

nodes.name: Log to Google Sheets
nodes.notes: Logs campaign details to a Google Sheet for tracking and analytics. Create a sheet with columns: Date, Topic, Campaign Angle, Platforms, Poster URL, Status.

nodes.name: Slack Notification (Optional)
nodes.notes: Sends a Slack notification when the campaign is published. Optional - set SLACK_WEBHOOK_PATH env variable or remove this node.
